hero.title:
Reading the Earth,
One Layer at a Time
hero.description: Dr. Geo is the professional practice of Daiana Rodrigues, geologist — delivering geological mapping, environmental consulting, soil and rock analysis, and field surveys with scientific rigor and practical results.

highlights.title: Why Work with Daiana?
highlights.subtitle: Years of fieldwork, laboratory analysis, and technical reporting — combined with a commitment to clear communication and reliable results.
highlights.card1_desc: Direct field experience across diverse geological settings — from urban soil surveys to remote rock outcrop mapping.
highlights.card2_desc: Rigorous sampling methodology and lab-validated analysis ensuring every result you receive is accurate and defensible.
highlights.card3_desc: Technical findings translated into concise, actionable reports that clients and stakeholders can actually use.

how.title: How I Work
how.subtitle: A structured, transparent process from initial briefing to final report delivery.
how.step1_desc: We start with a conversation to understand your project goals, site conditions, regulatory requirements, and timeline.
how.step2_desc: I conduct the necessary field surveys, collect samples, and perform or coordinate laboratory analyses with accredited partners.
how.step3_desc: You receive a clear technical report with findings, interpretations, and recommendations — and I remain available for follow-up questions.

cta.title: Have a Project That Needs a Geologist?
cta.subtitle: Get in touch and let's discuss how I can help — from a quick consultation to a full field campaign.

hero.title:
Geologist. Field Scientist.
Problem Solver.
hero.description: I'm Daiana Rodrigues, a geologist with a passion for understanding what lies beneath the surface. My work spans environmental consulting, geological mapping, geotechnical assessment, and mineral exploration.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Bring geological clarity to every project
mission.text: I exist to help clients make informed decisions about land, soil, and subsurface conditions — providing the geological intelligence that reduces risk and drives sustainable outcomes.

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: Science that serves the real world
vision.text: I believe geology should be accessible, practical, and impactful. My goal is to bridge the gap between scientific knowledge and the real decisions that shape how we use and protect the Earth.

values.title: How I Approach My Work
values.subtitle: The principles that guide every field visit, every sample, and every report I deliver.
values.value1_desc: Every finding is grounded in evidence. I never compromise on methodology or misrepresent results, regardless of what a client might prefer to hear.
values.value2_desc: No desk-based assumption replaces boots on the ground. I prioritize direct observation and hands-on data collection at every stage.
values.value3_desc: You'll always know what I'm doing, why, and what it means. No black boxes — just clear communication throughout the engagement.
values.value4_desc: I conduct all fieldwork with minimal environmental disturbance and full compliance with applicable regulations and best practices.
values.value5_desc: Geology is a living science. I stay current with new methodologies, software, and research to bring the best available knowledge to every project.

team.title: Credentials & Background
team.subtitle: A professional profile built on academic training, field experience, and ongoing development.
team.member1_bio: BSc in Geology with specialization in environmental and applied geology. Registered with the regional geology council (CREA).
team.member2_bio: Graduated with distinction in Geology, with thesis research focused on sedimentary basin analysis in central Brazil.
team.member3_bio: Worked across mining, infrastructure, environmental licensing, and urban geotechnics in multiple Brazilian states.
team.member4_bio: Experienced in petrographic analysis, granulometry, XRF/XRD interpretation, and geochemical soil sampling.

timeline.title: My Journey
timeline.subtitle: From the first geology class to a full independent practice — a decade of learning and fieldwork.
timeline.tl1_desc: Graduated from the University of São Paulo, completing fieldwork in the Paraná Basin and thesis on clastic sediment provenance.
timeline.tl2_desc: Joined a mid-sized mining consultancy as a junior geologist, logging drill cores and supporting resource estimation in Minas Gerais.
timeline.tl3_desc: Transitioned into environmental geology, leading soil contamination assessments and remediation plans for industrial clients.
timeline.tl4_desc: Established Dr. Geo as a solo consultancy, bringing together mapping, environmental, and geotechnical services under one roof.
timeline.tl5_desc: Completed projects in 8 Brazilian states, building a network of laboratory and survey partners to serve clients nationwide.

cta.title: Let's Work Together
cta.subtitle: Whether you need a geological report, a field survey, or an expert opinion — I'm ready to help.

hero.title:
Geological Services
You Can Rely On
hero.description: From soil investigation to geological mapping and environmental consulting, I offer a focused set of services tailored to the needs of engineering firms, developers, public agencies, and landowners.

offerings.title: My Services
offerings.subtitle: Six core services — each backed by field experience, laboratory rigor, and clear technical reporting.
offerings.svc1_desc: Systematic mapping of surface geology, rock outcrops, structural features, and lithological contacts for exploration, planning, and licensing projects.
offerings.svc2_desc: Sampling campaigns, field logging, and laboratory analysis to characterize soil profiles, bearing capacity, contamination, and geotechnical properties.
offerings.svc3_desc: Phase I and Phase II environmental site assessments, contamination investigations, and remediation support in compliance with Brazilian and international standards.
offerings.svc4_desc: Subsurface characterization for civil engineering projects — foundations, slope stability, excavation planning, and risk assessment for infrastructure development.
offerings.svc5_desc: Field prospecting, drill core logging, geochemical sampling, and technical reporting to support exploration programs from early stage to resource delineation.
offerings.svc6_desc: Preparation of technical geological reports, environmental impact documentation, and expert geological opinions for legal, licensing, and regulatory purposes.

features.title: How I Stand Out
features.subtitle: Two defining strengths that clients consistently rely on.
features.feat1_desc: I believe the most reliable geological data comes from being on-site. Every project I take on includes direct field investigation — no remote-only assessments.
features.feat1_b3: Integration with satellite and aerial imagery where relevant
features.feat2_desc: My reports are written for the people who need to act on them — engineers, lawyers, regulators, and project managers — not just for fellow geologists.

pricing.title: Service Packages
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing for common project types. Custom quotes available for complex or multi-stage projects.
pricing.plan1_desc: Ideal for quick assessments, single-site inspections, or preliminary geological opinions.
pricing.plan2_desc: For projects requiring sampling, lab analysis, and a formal technical report.
pricing.plan2_f2: Soil or rock sampling & lab coordination
pricing.plan3_desc: End-to-end geological consulting for complex, multi-phase, or long-duration projects.

cta.title: Not Sure What You Need?
cta.subtitle: Send me a message describing your project and I'll recommend the right approach — no commitment required.

hero.title:
Let's Talk About
Your Project
hero.description: Whether you have a specific geological question, need a quote for a field campaign, or just want to understand your options — I'm happy to have a conversation.

form.title: Send Me a Message
form.subtitle: I typically respond within one business day.
form.subject: What's this about?
form.message_placeholder: Describe your project, site location, timeline, or any questions you have…
form.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you within one business day.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the questions I hear most often.
faq.faq1_q: What types of projects do you take on?
faq.faq1_a: I work on environmental assessments, geological mapping, geotechnical investigations, mineral exploration support, and technical reporting for engineering and licensing projects.
faq.faq2_q: Do you work outside São Paulo?
faq.faq2_a: Yes — I have completed projects across multiple Brazilian states and can travel for field campaigns. Travel costs are quoted separately for projects outside the Greater São Paulo area.
faq.faq3_q: How long does a typical project take?
faq.faq3_a: It depends on scope. A single-site visit and summary report can be delivered in 3–5 business days. Full investigation and reporting projects typically take 2–6 weeks.
faq.faq4_q: Are your reports accepted for regulatory licensing?
faq.faq4_a: Yes. My reports follow applicable ABNT standards and regulatory guidelines. I am registered with CREA and reports are issued under my professional seal.
faq.faq5_q: Do you work with engineering or construction firms?
faq.faq5_a: Absolutely. I regularly collaborate with civil and environmental engineering firms, providing the geological component of larger project teams.
faq.faq6_q: How do I get a quote?
faq.faq6_a: Send me a message using the form with a brief description of your project, site location, and any known timeline. I'll respond with a scope and fee estimate within one business day.
